mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_name as resourceName, resource_code as resourceCode, resource_type as resourceType, quantity as num, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM sys_resource ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, resource_name as resourceName, resource_code as resourceCode, resource_type as resourceType, quantity as num, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM sys_resource WHERE id IN
#{id}
